requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Ethiopian Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（埃塞俄比亚采纳IEC 60335-2-24的标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（衣索比亞採納IEC 60335-2-24的標準）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances supplied to the Ethiopian market are expected to comply with the relevant Ethiopian Standard (ES) for the safety of refrigerating appliances, which the Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) adopts from the international standard IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read together with the general standard ES IEC 60335-1. ESA is the national standards body that develops and adopts ES standards (predominantly by direct adoption of IEC/ISO texts). Conformity of regulated/imported products is demonstrated through the conformity-assessment and import-inspection regime operated by CACEA (Conformity Assessment, Certification and the Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration import-inspection function) rather than a manufacturer self-declared CE-style mark. Key technical requirements mirror IEC 60335-2-24: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, earthing continuity, creepage and clearance, mechanical strength, thermal cut-outs, and appliance marking. The in-country importer typically arranges the conformity/inspection step.
summary.zh: 供应埃塞俄比亚市场的家用制冷器具应符合相关的埃塞俄比亚标准（ES）中关于制冷器具安全的要求，该标准由埃塞俄比亚标准局（ESA）从国际标准IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）采纳，并须与通用标准ES IEC 60335-1结合使用。ESA是制定和采纳ES标准的国家标准机构（主要通过直接采纳IEC/ISO文本）。受监管/进口产品的符合性通过CACEA（合格评定、认证及贸易与区域一体化部进口检验职能）运行的合格评定与进口检验制度来证明，而非制造商自我声明的CE式标志。核心技术要求与IEC 60335-2-24一致：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、接地连续性、爬电距离与电气间隙、机械强度、热断路器及器具标识。通常由在地进口商安排符合性/检验环节。
summary.zht: 供應衣索比亞市場的家用製冷器具應符合相關的衣索比亞標準（ES）中關於製冷器具安全的要求，該標準由衣索比亞標準局（ESA）從國際標準IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）採納，並須與通用標準ES IEC 60335-1結合使用。ESA是制定和採納ES標準的國家標準機構（主要通過直接採納IEC/ISO文本）。受監管/進口產品的符合性通過CACEA（合格評定、認證及貿易與區域一體化部進口檢驗職能）運行的合格評定與進口檢驗制度來證明，而非製造商自我聲明的CE式標誌。核心技術要求與IEC 60335-2-24一致：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、接地連續性、爬電距離與電氣間隙、機械強度、熱斷路器及器具標識。通常由在地進口商安排符合性/檢驗環節。

standards_or_laws: ES IEC 60335-2-24 (Ethiopian Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24) — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
ES IEC 60335-1 (Ethiopian Standard adopting IEC 60335-1) — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) — national standards body adopting IEC/ISO standards as ES
CACEA / Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration — conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read with the general standard GB 4706.1. GB 4706.13 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China. Because both the Ethiopian ES standard and the Chinese GB standard descend from the same IEC 60335-2-24 base, the underlying technical content is closely aligned — but the Chinese CCC certificate/mark and CNAS test reports are not automatically accepted as Ethiopian conformity evidence; Ethiopian acceptance is determined through the CACEA/import-inspection pathway.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与通用标准GB 4706.1结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于埃塞ES标准与中国GB标准同源于IEC 60335-2-24基础文本，其底层技术内容高度一致——但中国CCC证书/标志及CNAS检测报告不被自动接受为埃塞符合性证据；埃塞的接受度通过CACEA/进口检验路径确定。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與通用標準GB 4706.1結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於衣索ES標準與中國GB標準同源於IEC 60335-2-24基礎文本，其底層技術內容高度一致——但中國CCC證書/標誌及CNAS檢測報告不被自動接受為衣索符合性證據；衣索的接受度通過CACEA/進口檢驗路徑確定。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both the Ethiopian ES standard and Chinese GB 4706.13 derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the core technical gap is smaller than against an EU-deviated EN standard. The practical gaps are procedural: (1) Conformity route — Ethiopia demonstrates compliance through CACEA/Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection (often pre-shipment or destination inspection arranged by the in-country importer), not through China's CCC mark; the importer should confirm whether an IEC/CB Scheme test report (IECEE NCB, IEC 60335-2-24 basis) is acceptable to streamline acceptance. (2) Test-report basis — a CB Scheme certificate covering IEC 60335-2-24 plus the general IEC 60335-1 is the most portable evidence; CCC-only documentation referencing GB national deviations may need supplementary IEC-referenced reports. (3) Voltage/marking — Ethiopia's grid is 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase, matching the 50 Hz frequency used in China and a similar single-phase nominal voltage (note China's domestic three-phase nominal is 380 V), so frequency-related re-design is generally not required; appliance marking and instructions should meet importer/ESA expectations. Confirm exact current ES adoption edition and the CACEA inspection procedure with the importer.
gap.zh: 由于埃塞ES标准与中国GB 4706.13均源自IEC 60335-2-24，核心技术差距小于针对含欧盟偏差的EN标准。实际差距为程序性：（1）符合性路径——埃塞通过CACEA/贸易部合格评定与进口检验（通常为装运前或目的地检验，由在地进口商安排）证明合规，而非通过中国CCC标志；进口商应确认IEC/CB体系检测报告（IECEE NCB，基于IEC 60335-2-24）是否被接受以简化通关。（2）检测报告依据——涵盖IEC 60335-2-24及通用IEC 60335-1的CB体系证书是最具可移植性的证据；仅有引用GB国家偏差的CCC文件可能需补充引用IEC的报告。（3）电压/标识——埃塞电网为220 V/50 Hz单相，与中国使用的50 Hz频率相同、单相标称电压相近（注：中国国内三相标称为380 V），故通常无需与频率相关的重新设计；器具标识及说明书应满足进口商/ESA的预期。请向进口商确认现行ES采纳版本及CACEA检验程序。
gap.zht: 由於衣索ES標準與中國GB 4706.13均源自IEC 60335-2-24，核心技術差距小於針對含歐盟偏差的EN標準。實際差距為程序性：（1）符合性路徑——衣索通過CACEA/貿易部合格評定與進口檢驗（通常為裝運前或目的地檢驗，由在地進口商安排）證明合規，而非通過中國CCC標誌；進口商應確認IEC/CB體系檢測報告（IECEE NCB，基於IEC 60335-2-24）是否被接受以簡化通關。（2）檢測報告依據——涵蓋IEC 60335-2-24及通用IEC 60335-1的CB體系證書是最具可移植性的證據；僅有引用GB國家偏差的CCC文件可能需補充引用IEC的報告。（3）電壓/標識——衣索電網為220 V/50 Hz單相，與中國使用的50 Hz頻率相同、單相標稱電壓相近（注：中國國內三相標稱為380 V），故通常無需與頻率相關的重新設計；器具標識及說明書應滿足進口商/ESA的預期。請向進口商確認現行ES採納版本及CACEA檢驗程序。

mandatory_status.target: Expected/effectively mandatory for import — conformity with the Ethiopian Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 is demonstrated through CACEA/Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection arranged via the in-country importer; confirm current procedure and any pre-shipment inspection requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — base standard IEC 60335-2-24, adopted by Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) as ES

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ethiopian electrical-safety requirements for household refrigerators are based on the Ethiopian Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (with ES IEC 60335-1). Because Chinese GB 4706.13 shares the same IEC parent, technical alignment is strong, but the Chinese CCC mark is not automatically accepted — conformity is demonstrated through CACEA/Ministry of Trade import inspection via the in-country importer. An IECEE CB Scheme report to IEC 60335-2-24 / 60335-1 is the most portable evidence; confirm the exact ES edition and inspection procedure with the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚家用电冰箱电气安全要求基于采纳IEC 60335-2-24的埃塞俄比亚标准（配合ES IEC 60335-1）。由于中国GB 4706.13与之同源于IEC，技术上高度一致，但中国CCC标志不被自动接受——符合性通过在地进口商经CACEA/贸易部进口检验证明。基于IEC 60335-2-24/60335-1的IECEE CB体系报告是最具可移植性的证据；请向进口商确认确切的ES版本及检验程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞家用電冰箱電氣安全要求基於採納IEC 60335-2-24的衣索比亞標準（配合ES IEC 60335-1）。由於中國GB 4706.13與之同源於IEC，技術上高度一致，但中國CCC標誌不被自動接受——符合性通過在地進口商經CACEA/貿易部進口檢驗證明。基於IEC 60335-2-24/60335-1的IECEE CB體系報告是最具可移植性的證據；請向進口商確認確切的ES版本及檢驗程序。
